chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 1189 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.28 2. For orders on CMA No.524/2025 3. For hearing of main case 4. For hearing of CMA No.525/2025 06.04.2026 This matter is pending since 2023 without any progress remains listed for orders as to non-prosecution of appeal. On 13.09.2024, week’s time was allowed for compliance. Today, learned counsel for the applicant remains unrepresented without intimation and / or justification. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with the matter. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
